dominants.dominant_desc:
Желательно перед файтом стакнуться, чтобы проблем не было
Держать нашу пассивку и ультовать в нужных таргетов
Самая классическая комбинация это 2-базовая атка-1-3-базовая атка, спамим сколько можем и добиваем ультой цель

Когда у вас все ещё есть серая полоска, то вы можете сохранить его и увеличивать хп (для урона с ульты) нужно просто в лесных отдать навыки постепенно (главное крипа не убить) после чего может прыгнуть в центр файта и сразу ультануть

Собираем необходимые предметы и просто танчим весь урон, даём команде фронт

hero.hero_overview: Танк лес и самый лучший для соло ранга
hero.hero_strength:
Сильный на всех стадиях, живучий, контроль и урон с ульты. Также сильный смайт
Может доминировать со старта, вы просто наслаждаетесь игрой данного персонажа
hero.hero_weakness:
Скорость фарма в лесу конечно у фреда самый лучший из танк лесников, но все равно от убийц/бойцов отстаёт
Чистый урон также может испортить вашу игру, это главные слабые стороны

hero.hero_overview: Fredrinn is a top-tier Tank/Fighter in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, primarily played as a high-sustain Jungler or EXP Laner. Known as the "Rogue Appraiser," he excels at absorbing damage and controlling the battlefield with consistent crowd control
hero.hero_strength: Fredrinn is a top-tier utility jungler he has very high crowd-control and high sustainability and he can deal high damage on the enemy
hero.hero_weakness: He's weak on those who has very high mobility and to those who can poke him easily like yve or zhuxin

hero.hero_overview: Is a powerful tank/fighter hero who excels in the Jungle. His abilities allow him to initiate fights, control the battlefield with crowd control, and charge into the enemy lines. Fredrinn'farming routes typically involve prioritizing buffs and lanes to create an advantage for his team to win the game
hero.hero_strength: Tanky Damage Dealer: Even with a full tank build, his skills scale with his maximum HP, enabling him to deal significant damage
hero.hero_weakness: Weak Early Game (EXP lane): In the EXP lane, he can be outmatched early by strong sustain/poke fighters like Lapu-Lapu, Uranus, or Esmeralda you need to watch out if enemy pick Karrie

hero.hero_strength: This hero stand out when it's early and having a nice support or initiator to guide. He stands out in retribution battle and all assasins should fear him because of its strength to cancel out their dashes and knocked them up.
hero.hero_weakness: Fredrinn when handled wrong might be bursted down easily or taken down. As of now he is in the meta, One of the major weaknesses of Fredrinn are the DPS, True Damage, Armor piercing, Based on HP heroes like Karrie, Alpha, Xborg, Cici, Lunox, Zhuxin, Yve, Natan, Baxia and others.

data.title: AS OF NOW BEST BUILD FOR FRED

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Since Fredrinn loves soaking damage, Angela will be his best match to further increase his survivability.
While Fredrinn is soaking the damage, Ixia then places her ultimate to finish up the enemies that Fredrinn is constantly controlling
Ruby's hook gives Fredrinn time to crowd control enemies again. Basically removing the ability of the enemies to move while Ixia is constantly attacking them
She gives constant support while Fredrinn and Ruby fights off the enemies

counters.counter_desc: Karrie shreds through Fredrinn's toughness, you'll end up dying before you even use your 4rth skill.
Early invade is Fredrinn's weakness, and Hilda's early damage makes Fredrinn turn red before his jungle monsters.

dominants.dominant_desc: Always start on purple buff so you'll have lvl 2 retribution, then move on and try to get the litho, then move to the golem, then the red buff and the fire bettle. You'll be lvl 4 after you killed the big fire bettle.

At mid game, you can handle 3 or more enemies attacking you, just make sure you have the right equipments/build depending on the enemy team line up, try using 3rd skill then wait walk towards your team then use second skill and first skill again to maximize your skills + sets the enemies.

emblems.emblem_desc: His skills relies on high hp for damage, i used Support Emblem for the cooldown reduction (for chain CC), healing effect (when using first skill to heal if you have full crystal energy), and movement speed (he walks so slow). I used vitality for extra hp and additional damage to his skills, seasoned hunter for extra jungling speed, and impure rage for extra skill damage. You could replace vitality with inspire for extra cd reduction.

equips.equip_desc: This is a max cd reduction build that gives you chain cc. On the early game i suggest you to build molten essence first before buying brute force breastplate then the radiant armor or athena's shield depending on the enemy heroes. You could sell molten essence in late game and complete these build (molten essence increases your early jungling speed but doesn't do much on late game)

hero.hero_strength: His first skill and ultimate (slam) is great for last hitting objectives when you land it with retribution simultaneously. Having just Brute Force Breastplate is enough to tank 2 enemies, just make sure you have the right emblem for this one.
hero.hero_weakness: Early game farming is so slow, but if you're on a trio lobby, tell them to throw a skill before they move on on their lanes. Note: don't use your retribution early, out of 10 matches 7 of them tried to invade me early. Being level 3 on a turtle fight as Fredrinn doesn't do much because of his 3rd skill is his key skill to have that chain CC, so just use the retri if you're sure that they don't try invading you.

spell.spell_desc: Use retribution simultaneously with skill 1 or 4, if the enemy is constantly attacking the first turtle and you have level 6 or 7 (including the litho wanderer) retribution, you should wait atleast 1k or 800 hp before you use your first skill+retri for a secured objective.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Here is a battle stage designed for Fredrinn in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang:
 
Stage Name: Crystal Peak of Los Pecados
 
Lore Background:
 
Nestled in the heart of Los Pecados, Crystal Peak is a forbidden mountain said to hold the key to reviving lost souls. Fredrinn ventures here to find a relic that can bring back his best friend, only to discover the peak is guarded by ancientcient crystal golems and corrupted treasure hunters. The stage is filled with glowing crystals that amplify Fredrinn's abilities but also attract enemies.
 
Stage Layout:
 
- Central Crystal: A massive crystal at the center of the stage that grants a temporary shield and damage boost to the first hero who touches it.
- Crystal Paths: Narrow paths lined with crystals that slow down enemies but increase Fredrinn's movement speed.
- Treasure Chests: Scattered throughout the stage, these chests contain healing potions and mana potions. However, opening a chest may also spawn a group of treasure hunters.
- Golem Lairs: Two lairs located at the corners of the stage that spawn crystal golems every 2 minutes. These golems are tough but drop valuable items when defeated.
 
Stage Effects:
 
- Crystal Energy: The stage is filled with crystal energy that increases Fredrinn's Crystal Energy gain by 50%.
- Corrupted Aura: The corrupted treasure hunters emit auras that reduce the defense of nearby heroes.
- Crystal Storm: Every 5 minutes, a crystal storm hits the stage, dealing damage to all heroes and reducing their vision.
 
Battle Strategy:
 
- Early Game: Fredrinn should focus on farming minions and jungle creeps to gain experience and gold. He should also try to collect as much Crystal Energy as possible to use his ultimate skill effectively.
- Mid Game: Fredrinn should start ganking other lanes to help his team get kills and objectives. He should use his crowd control skills to initiate team fights and protect his teammates.
- Late Game: Fredrinn should focus on team fighting and pushing towers. He sho

hero.hero_overview:
Fredrinn is a tank/fighter hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known as the "Rogue Appraiser". Here is a Heroview of Fredrinn:
 
- Background: Fredrinn is the son of Duke Vance and a talented explorer in Los Pecados. He is driven by a desire to reunite with his best friend, whose death is linked to a mysterious crystal in his chest.
- Skills:
- Passive - Crystalline Armor: Stores 6% of damage taken as Crystal Energy, which can be converted into HP when dealing damage. Gains Combo Points by hitting non-minion enemies, up to 4, which affect the effectiveness of his ultimate skill.
- Skill 1 - Piercing Strike: Thrusts forward, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies. Enhances the next basic attack for extra range and damage.
- Skill 2 - Brave Assault: Dashes forward, dealing damage to the first non-minion enemy hit. Enhances the next basic attack to knock the target airborne.
- Skill 3 - Energy Eruption: Delivers a mighty blow, dealing physical damage and taunting nearby enemies. Hitting non-minion enemies reduces skill cooldowns and grants extra defense.
- Playstyle: Fredrinn is a durable hero with excellent crowd-control skills. He can be played in the jungle or EXP lane. To maximize his effectiveness, players should focus on building items that boost his durability and use his skills to hit enemies and generate Combo Points for his ultimate.
- Strengths: High durability, strong crowd control, and good damage output. He is also adaptable and can be played in different roles and lanes.
- Weaknesses: Medium mechanical skill requirement, and his ultimate skill depends on Combo Points, which can be difficult to manage. He is also vulnerable to burst damage and crowd control.
hero.hero_strength:
Fredrinn is a tank/fighter hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang with remarkable strengths, making him a top pick in both ranked and professional play. Here are his key advantages:
 
- Exceptional Durability: His passive, Crystalline Armor, stores 6% of damage taken as Crystal Energy, which can be converted into HP when dealing damage. This allows him to sustain himself in prolonged fights and soak up significant damage for his team.
- Strong Crowd Control: Fredrinn's skills provide multiple crowd control effects. His Skill 2 - Brave Assault can knock enemies airborne, while his Skill 3 - Energy Eruption taunts nearby enemies, forcing them to attack him. These abilities make him effective at initiating team fights and disrupting the enemy's formation.
- High Damage Output: Despite being a tank, Fredrinn deals considerable damage. His Skill 1 - Piercing Strike and enhanced basic attacks deal physical damage based on his total HP, making him a threat to both squishy and tanky enemies.
- Versatility: Fredrinn can be played in multiple roles, including EXP lane, jungle, and roam. He is adaptable to different team compositions and can adjust his build to suit the situation.
- Scaling Power: Fredrinn's strength increases as the game progresses. His passive and skills benefit from high HP, so building items that boost his durability will also increase his damage output.
hero.hero_weakness:
Fredrinn is a tank/fighter hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang with the title "Rogue Appraiser". Here are his weaknesses:
 
- Dependence on Combo Points: Fredrinn's ultimate skills require combo points, which are gained by hitting non-minion enemies with his first and second skills. If he fails to hit enemies, he cannot use his ultimate skills effectively.
- Vulnerability to Burst Damage: Although Fredrinn has high durability, he is vulnerable to burst damage, which can quickly deplete his health before he can convert his Crystal Energy into HP.
- Medium Mechanical Skill Requirement: Fredrinn has a medium mechanical skill requirement, which means that he may be difficult for beginners to master. Players need to be able to time his skills correctly and manage his combo points effectively to maximize his effectiveness.
- Limited Mobility: Fredrinn has limited mobility, which means that he may be difficult to escape from enemies or chase down fleeing enemies. His only mobility skill is his second skill, which has a relatively long cooldown.
- Susceptibility to Crowd Control: Fredrinn is susceptible to crowd control effects, such as stuns, silences, and slows, which can prevent him from using his skills or moving freely. This can make him an easy target for enemies to focus on and take down.

- Effect: When activated, the user reduces damage taken by 35% for 3 seconds. Additionally, over 75 seconds, the user reflects 50 + 25% of incoming damage back to attackers.
- Cooldown: 90 seconds.
